\oint_{\partial \Sigma} \langle T^{\mu\nu} \rangle_{vac} n_\mu d\Sigma_\nu = \text{Residue}[TZP, \in fty
\]
\[
Psi(r_{TZP}, t) == J_0(2.4048 \rho) \times \exp(i n \theta)
\]
